mapper.sql: airway_reservation_id, route_deviation_rate, route_deviation_amount, route_deviation_time, airway_administrator_id, operator_id, airway_id, aircraft_info_id, route_deviation_coordinates
mapper.select:
SELECT deviation.airway_reservation_id, deviation.airway_id, deviation.airway_administrator_id,
deviation.route_deviation_rate, deviation.route_deviation_amount, deviation.route_deviation_time, deviation.operator_id, deviation.route_deviation_coordinates, deviation.aircraft_info_id FROM t_airway_deviation as deviation JOIN t_airway_reservation as reservation ON (deviation.airway_reservation_id = reservation.airway_reservation_id) WHERE reservation.end_at BETWEEN #{startAt} AND #{endAt}
mapper.insert:
insert into t_airway_deviation ( airway_reservation_id, route_deviation_rate, route_deviation_amount, route_deviation_time, airway_administrator_id, operator_id, airway_id, aircraft_info_id, route_deviation_coordinates ) values
( #{item.airwayReservationId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.routeDeviationRate,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{item.routeDeviationAmount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.routeDeviationTime}::jsonb, #{item.airwayAdministratorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.operatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.airwayId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.aircraftInfoId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.routeDeviationCoordinates}::jsonb )
mapper.select:
SELECT airway_reservation_id, route_deviation_rate, route_deviation_amount, route_deviation_time, airway_administrator_id, operator_id, airway_id, route_deviation_coordinates FROM t_airway_deviation WHERE
airway_administrator_id = #{airwayAdministratorId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
operator_id = #{operatorId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
airway_id = #{airwayId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
EXISTS (select 1 FROM v_airway_design_area_info_section WHERE v_airway_design_area_info_section.airway_id = t_airway_deviation.airway_id and ST_Intersects(v_airway_design_area_info_section.geometry, ST_GeomFromText(#{coordinates, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 4326) ) ) and
t_airway_deviation.airway_reservation_id IN ( SELECT t_airway_reservation.airway_reservation_id FROM t_airway_reservation WHERE end_at BETWEEN #{startAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND #{endAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
